step_rationale: Causal atherogenic remnant particles; promote atherosclerosis and vascular toxicity via subendothelial retention.
mechanism: Triglyceride-rich lipoprotein accumulation in subendothelium initiates lipid oxidation and atherogenic inflammation driving atherothrombotic MI.

references.title: In the Beginning, Lipoproteins Cross the Endothelial Barrier.
Triglyceride-Rich Lipoprotein Remnants and Cardiovascular Disease.
